# BitterClip

BitterClip is a speaker-aware media workspace for turning long recordings into
source-linked clips. It is part of the Bitter constellation of agent-operable
software systems.

## Canonical Pages

- Home: https://bitterclip.com/
- How it works: https://bitterclip.com/docs
- MCP and AI assistant workflow: https://bitterclip.com/mcp

## Markdown Alternates

Every public HTML page should have a Markdown twin for agents, crawlers, and
public repository indexing.

- Home Markdown: https://bitterclip.com/index.md
- How it works Markdown: https://bitterclip.com/docs.md
- MCP Markdown: https://bitterclip.com/mcp.md

## Repository Context

- Public repository: https://github.com/sheetgenius/bitterclip-marketing
- Changelog: https://github.com/sheetgenius/bitterclip-marketing/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Bitter: https://bitter.sh/
- BitterGrid: https://bittergrid.com/
